---
title: ""
excerpt: ""
category: ""
tags: []
header:
  overlay_filter: 0.5
  overlay_image: /assets/images/
  teaser: /assets/images/
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE, cache = FALSE}
# ── gabrielebaldassarre.com — Rmd template ───────────────────────
# Standard setup chunk: packages, par(), theme, paths.
# This runs in both RStudio (interactive) and Docker (batch).

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
invisible(library(pacman))
tryCatch({
  p_load("tidyverse", "rprojroot")
}, warning = function(w) stop(conditionMessage(w)))

root <- find_root(is_git_root)

# ── Shared chunk options ─────────────────────────────────────────
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  dev        = "svglite",
  dev.args   = list(bg = "transparent"),
  fig.retina = 2,
  echo       = FALSE,
  warning    = FALSE,
  message    = FALSE,
  cache      = TRUE
)

# ── Plot defaults ────────────────────────────────────────────────
old.par <- par(
  mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1),
  mgp = c(3, 0.4, 0),
  tck = -0.01,
  cex.axis = 0.9,
  las = 1
)

# ── Blog theme ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
if (file.exists(file.path(root, "R", "includes", "theme_gabriob.R"))) {
  source(file.path(root, "R", "includes", "theme_gabriob.R"))
}
```

<!--
  Your content here. Chunk metadata for figures:

  ```{r myplot, fig.asp = .7,
        fig.alt    = "Alt text for accessibility",
        fig.cap    = "Caption shown below the figure",
        fig.role   = "chart",
        fig.context = "result"}
  ```

  fig.role:    chart | diagram | screenshot | photo | illustration
  fig.context: result | step | architecture | comparison | evidence | reference
-->
